style_effects: Subtle steam curls rise from Venusaur's armored joints, reflecting distorted cityscapes in its polished steel plates. Glowing blue energy pulses rhythmically through its armor seams, casting sharp blue-white light that fractures into metallic dust particles. A cold, crystalline aura with sharp geometric edges surrounds its body, emitting a steady blue-white luminescence that casts long, precise shadows. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
